items.name: blur-reveal
items.title: Blur Reveal
items.description: Text fades in from a heavy blur into sharp focus.

items.name: typewriter
items.title: Typewriter
items.description: Character-by-character text reveal with a deterministic blinking cursor.

items.name: inline-highlight
items.title: Inline Highlight
items.description: Animates one word inside a sentence from a base color to a brand color.

items.name: text-fade-replace
items.title: Text Fade Replace
items.description: Cross-fades between two strings on the same line without layout shift.

items.name: strikethrough-replace
items.title: Strikethrough Replace
items.description: Draws a strike line across old text then reveals new text in its place.

items.name: staggered-fade-up
items.title: Staggered Fade Up
items.description: Words fade in and slide up one after another with a configurable delay.

items.name: masked-slide-reveal
items.title: Masked Slide Reveal
items.description: Words slide up out of an invisible horizontal mask, one after another.

items.name: tracking-in
items.title: Tracking In
items.description: Letter-spacing collapses and blur clears with a springy motion.

items.name: shimmer-sweep
items.title: Shimmer Sweep
items.description: Light shine sweeps across muted text via background-clip:text.

items.name: marker-highlight
items.title: Marker Highlight
items.description: Colored marker block draws behind a phrase as the text color shifts.

items.name: slot-machine-roll
items.title: Slot Machine Roll
items.description: Vertical reel scrolls characters from one value to another.

items.name: matrix-decode
items.title: Matrix Decode
items.description: Random scramble resolves left-to-right into the target text.

items.name: rgb-glitch-text
items.title: RGB Glitch Text
items.description: Three RGB-offset text copies jitter for a brief glitch window.

items.name: infinite-marquee
items.title: Infinite Marquee
items.description: Seamlessly looping horizontal text strip with optional stroke style.

items.name: mesh-gradient-bg
items.title: Mesh Gradient Background
items.description: Living gradient with amorphous color blobs slowly drifting across the frame.

items.name: dynamic-grid
items.title: Dynamic Grid
items.description: Subtle moving grid background with configurable cell size and direction.

items.name: spring-pop-in
items.title: Spring Pop In
items.description: Elastic spring-driven scale-in wrapper for any child element.

items.name: simulated-cursor
items.title: Simulated Cursor
items.description: Animated mouse cursor moving between waypoints with click ripple feedback.

items.name: pulsing-indicator
items.title: Pulsing Indicator
items.description: Continuous pulsing dot with ping ring for loading or live states.

items.name: directional-wipe
items.title: Directional Wipe
items.description: Slide one scene in while pushing the other out.

items.name: device-mockup-zoom
items.title: Device Mockup Zoom
items.description: Pull back from a UI to reveal it inside a device frame.

items.name: zoom-through-transition
items.title: Zoom Through Transition
items.description: Aggressively scale into the center of an element.

items.name: staggered-bento-grid
items.title: Staggered Bento Grid
items.description: Cards pop into a bento grid one after another with a spring.

items.name: chat-to-preview-layout
items.title: Chat to Preview Layout
items.description: Two-column layout where chat shrinks and preview expands.

items.name: bounding-box-selector
items.title: Bounding Box Selector
items.description: Figma-style selection rectangle appears around any element.

items.name: animated-line-chart
items.title: Animated Line Chart
items.description: Line chart whose SVG path draws on from left to right with a leading dot.

items.name: animated-bar-chart
items.title: Animated Bar Chart
items.description: Bars spring up from the baseline in a staggered cascade.

items.name: terminal-simulator
items.title: Terminal Simulator
items.description: Terminal window that types out commands and rolls old lines off the top.

items.name: code-diff-wipe
items.title: Code Diff Wipe
items.description: Before/after code reveal via clip-path wipe with a handle marker.

items.name: toast-notification
items.title: Toast Notification
items.description: System-style toast pops in, holds, then slides out.

items.name: drag-and-drop-flow
items.title: Drag and Drop Flow
items.description: Simulated file drag into a dropzone followed by upload progress.

items.name: progress-steps
items.title: Progress Steps
items.description: Multi-step pipeline with sequentially activating nodes and filling lines.

items.name: morphing-modal
items.title: Morphing Modal
items.description: A bento card lifts off the grid and blooms into a full-screen modal driven by a single heavy spring.

items.name: data-flow-pipes
items.title: Data Flow Pipes
items.description: Glowing data packets travel along SVG bezier pipes between system nodes, leaving fading trails.

items.name: cursor-flow
items.title: Cursor Flow
items.description: A realistic mouse that arcs along cubic Bezier paths, pauses, and clicks targets that dip in response.

items.name: code-accordion
items.title: Code Accordion
items.description: A code window that springs a range of lines closed and replaces them with a "N lines collapsed" placeholder.

items.name: glass-code-block
items.title: Glass Code Block
items.description: A premium frosted-glass code editor window with a regex tokenizer and line-by-line stagger reveal.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: A card with a moonlight-cool radial spotlight that follows a synthetic cursor and lights up its microborder.

items.name: perspective-marquee
items.title: Perspective Marquee
items.description: A 3D-tilted infinite marquee with depth-of-field blur on items rolling toward the horizon.

items.name: success-confetti
items.title: Success Confetti
items.description: Deterministic seeded confetti burst with optional headline.
